name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise canceling with two processors and eight microphones. Optimized for calls with precise voice pickup and natural sounding calls. Up to 30-hour battery life with quick charge.

name: Apple iPad Pro 12.9" M2
description: The most powerful iPad ever. With the M2 chip, stunning Liquid Retina XDR display, and an all-day battery, it's a portable powerhouse for creative professionals.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB
description: Tactile Cherry MX Blue switches with full per-key RGB backlighting. Aircraft-grade aluminum frame, N-key rollover, and programmable macros. Built for marathon gaming sessions.

name: 4K UHD Webcam Pro
description: Crystal-clear 4K video for professional streaming and video conferencing. Built-in AI-powered background blur, auto-framing, and studio-quality stereo microphone.

name: Premium Linen Oxford Shirt
description: Crafted from 100% premium Irish linen, this breathable Oxford shirt is perfect for both casual and smart-casual occasions. Features a relaxed fit with a spread collar.

name: Merino Wool Crewneck Sweater
description: Ultra-soft extra-fine Merino wool sweater with a classic crewneck silhouette. Naturally temperature-regulating and odor-resistant. A timeless wardrobe staple.

name: Running Shoes AeroMax Pro
description: Engineered for speed and comfort with carbon fiber plate and ZoomX foam cushioning. Designed for competitive road racing with a lightweight, breathable upper.

name: Atomic Habits – James Clear
description: The #1 New York Times bestseller. An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones. James Clear distills the most fundamental information about habit formation.

name: Deep Work – Cal Newport
description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world. Cal Newport makes the bold claim that cultivating a deep work ethic will produce massive benefits in an increasingly distracted world.

name: The Design of Everyday Things
description: A powerful primer on how and why some products satisfy customers while others only frustrate them. A classic in cognitive science and design — essential reading for designers.

name: Smart Planter with Self-Watering
description: Modern ceramic planter with a built-in water reservoir that keeps your plants perfectly hydrated for up to 3 weeks. Includes a water level indicator and drainage system.

name: Luxury Scented Candle Set
description: A curated collection of three hand-poured soy wax candles with natural wood wicks. Fragrances: Bergamot & Cedar, Amber & Vanilla, Sea Salt & Driftwood. 45 hrs burn time each.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair Pro
description: Full lumbar support with adjustable armrests, seat depth, and headrest. Breathable mesh back keeps you cool. 4D adjustability for personalized comfort during long work sessions.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° room-filling sound with a compact waterproof design. IP67 rated for full water submersion. 24-hour battery life and dual stereo pairing for massive sound.

name: Samsung 27" 4K Monitor
description: Ultra-slim 4K UHD IPS panel with 99% sRGB color accuracy, HDR600, and 5ms response time. Ideal for designers, video editors, and productivity power users.

name: Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
description: Contoured ergonomic design reduces wrist strain during long sessions. Silent clicks, 7 programmable buttons, and a 70-day battery life on a single AA battery.

name: USB-C 100W Charging Hub
description: 12-in-1 USB-C hub with 100W Power Delivery, 4K HDMI, SD/TF card reader, 3× USB-A 3.0, Ethernet, and 3.5mm audio. Perfect for laptop docking on the go.

name: Noise-Cancelling Earbuds Pro
description: Active noise cancellation with Adaptive Transparency mode. Custom-fit ear tips with H2 chip for unmatched audio performance. Resistance to sweat and water (IPX4).

name: Smart Watch Series X
description: Advanced health tracking with ECG, blood oxygen monitoring, and crash detection. Always-on Retina display with 18-hour battery life. Swimproof to 50 meters.

name: Portable SSD 2TB
description: Blazing-fast read speeds up to 2000MB/s in a palm-sized rugged design. USB 3.2 Gen 2×2 interface, drop-proof up to 3 meters, and password protection.

name: Classic Slim Chino Pants
description: Tailored slim-fit chinos in stretch cotton twill for all-day comfort. Wrinkle-resistant finish, versatile for office or weekend wear. Available in 8 colours.

name: Women's Yoga Leggings
description: High-waisted compression leggings in buttery-soft Nulu fabric. Four-way stretch, sweat-wicking, and squat-proof. Side pockets for phone and keys.

name: Waterproof Hiking Jacket
description: 3-layer GORE-TEX shell with fully taped seams, helmet-compatible hood, and pit-zip ventilation. Packs into its own pocket. Perfect for mountain and trail use.

name: Leather Chelsea Boots
description: Full-grain calfskin leather Chelsea boots with elastic side panels and a pull-tab. Goodyear-welted construction for superior durability and resolability.

name: Slim Fit Denim Jeans
description: Tapered slim-fit jeans in authentic selvedge Japanese denim. Medium indigo wash with subtle fading. Designed for a modern silhouette without sacrificing mobility.

name: Packable Down Puffer Vest
description: 700-fill power goose down vest with a water-repellent shell. Packs into its chest pocket. Lightweight warmth for layering on cold days without restricting arm movement.

name: The Lean Startup – Eric Ries
description: How today's entrepreneurs use continuous innovation to create radically successful businesses. A must-read for anyone building a product or company in the modern era.

name: Thinking, Fast and Slow
description: Nobel laureate Daniel Kahneman's groundbreaking exploration of the two systems that drive the way we think — fast, intuitive thinking and slow, deliberate thinking.

name: Zero to One – Peter Thiel
description: Notes on startups, or how to build the future. Peter Thiel shares the contrarian thinking that made PayPal and Palantir into global powerhouses.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer
description: Your journey to mastery. The classic guide to software development best practices, from DRY principles to refactoring and career advice for working developers.

name: Clean Code – Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Robert Martin explains the principles, patterns, and practices of writing clean, readable, and maintainable code.

name: Outdoor Garden String Lights
description: 50ft waterproof LED string lights with 25 shatterproof Edison-style bulbs. Perfect for patios, pergolas, and backyard gatherings. Warm white 2700K glow.

name: Cast Iron Dutch Oven 5.5 Qt
description: Enamelled cast iron Dutch oven with superior heat retention for slow cooking, braising, and baking. Compatible with all cooktops including induction. Oven-safe to 500°F.

name: Bamboo Bathroom Organizer Set
description: 5-piece bamboo bathroom countertop organizer. Includes toothbrush holder, soap dispenser, cotton jar, tray, and tumbler. Sustainable and moisture-resistant.

name: Linen Duvet Cover Set Queen
description: 100% stone-washed French linen duvet cover with two matching pillowcases. Gets softer with every wash. Button closure and interior ties. Available in 12 colours.

name: Wall-Mount Floating Shelves Set
description: Set of 3 solid walnut floating shelves with invisible brackets. Each shelf holds up to 30 lbs. No-stud mounting system included. Ideal for living room display.

name: Essential Oil Diffuser 500ml
description: Ultrasonic aromatherapy diffuser with 7 LED colour modes and auto shut-off. Runs up to 12 hours on a single fill. Whisper-quiet operation for bedroom use.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 1L
description: Triple-wall vacuum-insulated bottle keeps drinks cold 48 hrs or hot 24 hrs. BPA-free, leakproof lid with carry loop. Wide mouth fits standard ice cubes.

name: Foam Yoga Mat 6mm
description: Non-slip eco-friendly TPE yoga mat with alignment lines and carry strap. 6mm cushioning for joint support. Moisture-resistant and easy to clean.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set 5–52.5 lbs
description: Replaces 15 sets of weights in one compact design. Dial-select system adjusts in 2.5 lb increments up to 25 lbs, then 5 lb up to 52.5 lbs. Ideal for home gyms.

name: Trekking Poles Carbon Fiber
description: Ultralight 3-section carbon fibre trekking poles with cork grips. Quick-lock adjustment, foam wrist straps, and interchangeable baskets for trail and snow use.

name: Cycling Helmet MIPS
description: Aero road cycling helmet with MIPS brain protection system, 20 vents, and adjustable retention dial. Lightweight 280g shell meets CPSC and CE EN1078 safety standards.

name: Resistance Bands Set (5 Levels)
description: Set of 5 latex resistance bands from 10 to 50 lbs. Ideal for stretching, strength training, and physiotherapy. Comes with a mesh carry bag and exercise guide.

name: Camping Sleeping Bag -10°C
description: 3-season mummy sleeping bag rated to -10°C with 650 fill-power duck down. Trapezoidal footbox, draft collar, and full-length anti-snag zipper. Packs to 5L.

name: Instax Mini 12 Instant Camera
description: Compact instant film camera with automatic exposure, selfie mode mirror, and close-up lens attachment. Produces credit-card-sized prints in seconds.

name: E-Ink E-Reader 7" Waterproof
description: Glare-free 300 PPI e-ink display with adjustable warm light. IPX8 waterproof, weeks of battery life, and 32GB storage for thousands of books. Thin at 8.9mm.

name: Smart Home Security Camera
description: 2K QHD indoor security camera with AI human detection, two-way audio, and colour night vision. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant. Local and cloud storage.

name: Graphic Novel: Maus – Art Spiegelman
description: The Pulitzer Prize-winning graphic novel about the Holocaust told through the metaphor of cats and mice. A landmark work of literature and sequential art.

name: Educated – Tara Westover
description: A memoir about a young girl who, kept out of school, leaves her survivalist family and goes on to earn a PhD from Cambridge University. Unforgettable and inspiring.

name: The Psychology of Money
description: Timeless lessons on wealth, greed, and happiness. Morgan Housel shares 19 short stories exploring the ways people think about money through human history and behaviour.

name: Artisan Pour-Over Coffee Set
description: Hand-blown borosilicate glass pour-over dripper with gooseneck kettle, reusable stainless steel filter, and walnut stand. Brews a perfect 400ml cup every time.

name: Chef's Knife 8" German Steel
description: Hand-forged high-carbon German stainless steel chef's knife with a full-tang ergonomic pakkawood handle. Rockwell hardness 58, factory-sharpened to 15° edge.

name: Countertop Espresso Machine
description: 15-bar pressure pump espresso machine with a built-in steam wand, programmable shot volume, and rapid heat system. Makes espresso, cappuccino, and latte.

name: Ceramic Non-Stick Cookware Set
description: 10-piece ceramic non-stick cookware set in matte black. PFOA/PTFE-free coating, oven-safe to 450°F, and compatible with all cooktops including induction.

name: Vitamix Blender Pro 750
description: Professional-grade blender with 5 pre-programmed settings, 2.2HP motor, and hardened stainless steel blades. Self-cleaning in 60 seconds. Variable speed control.

name: Air Fryer XL 6Qt
description: Digital air fryer with 7 preset cooking modes — air fry, roast, broil, bake, reheat, dehydrate, and keep warm. Dishwasher-safe basket. 6-quart capacity for family meals.

name: Wooden Serving Board Large
description: Large end-grain acacia wood serving and charcuterie board with juice groove and built-in handles. Naturally antibacterial and knife-friendly. Measures 50 × 35 cm.

name: Digital Kitchen Scale 5kg
description: Precision 1g digital kitchen scale with tare function, unit conversion (g/oz/lb/ml), backlit LCD, and slim profile. Includes a stainless steel weighing platform.

name: Skincare Vitamin C Serum 30ml
description: 20% stabilized Vitamin C with Vitamin E and Ferulic Acid for maximum antioxidant protection. Brightens dark spots, firms skin, and boosts collagen. Dermatologist tested.

name: Retinol Night Cream 50ml
description: 0.5% encapsulated retinol moisturiser with peptides and hyaluronic acid. Reduces fine lines overnight while maintaining the skin barrier. Fragrance-free formula.

name: SPF 50 Mineral Sunscreen 100ml
description: Lightweight, reef-safe mineral sunscreen with SPF 50 and PA++++. Non-greasy, invisible finish suitable for all skin tones. Water-resistant for 80 minutes.

name: Hyaluronic Acid Toner 200ml
description: Alcohol-free hydrating toner with 3-molecular-weight hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, and centella asiatica. Preps skin for better product absorption.

name: Electric Facial Cleansing Brush
description: Sonic silicone facial cleansing brush with 3 speeds and a waterproof design. Removes 99.5% of dirt and 2× more makeup than manual cleansing. USB rechargeable.

name: Perfume – Maison Margiela Replica
description: Replica 'By the Fireplace' eau de toilette. Woody warm notes of chestnut, cashmeran, and guaiacwood with top notes of orange and pink pepper. 100ml.

name: Lip Gloss Set – 12 Shades
description: High-shine non-sticky lip gloss set in 12 universally flattering shades. Infused with vitamin E and jojoba oil for lasting hydration. Vegan and cruelty-free.

name: Noise Machine & Sleep Sound Therapy
description: 30 soothing sounds including white noise, nature, and fan. Physical buttons, night light, and memory function. Compact design for home, office, or travel use.

name: Smart LED Bulb E27 Color (4-Pack)
description: 16 million colour RGB + tunable white smart LED bulb. Works with Alexa, Google Home, and Apple HomeKit. Dimmable, no hub required, Wi-Fi controlled via app.

name: Robot Vacuum Cleaner Auto-Mapping
description: LiDAR laser navigation robot vacuum with 4000Pa suction and 3-in-1 vacuuming, sweeping, and mopping. Obstacle avoidance, no-go zone mapping, and 180-min battery.

name: Acrylic Paint Set 48 Colours
description: Professional-grade heavy-body acrylic paints with intense pigments and smooth consistency. Suitable for canvas, wood, fabric, and ceramic. Each tube is 22ml.

name: Watercolour Brush Pen Set 36
description: 36 dual-tip watercolour brush pens with real nylon bristle tips and a fine liner tip. Water-based, blendable, and acid-free. Includes a water blending brush.

name: Lego Architecture Eiffel Tower
description: 2,710-piece Lego Architecture Eiffel Tower set. Intricate replica of the iconic Paris landmark reaching 59cm tall. Suitable for adults 18+. Great display piece.

name: Chess Set Luxury Wooden
description: Hand-carved solid rosewood and maple chess set with a folding board and storage compartment. King height 90mm, tournament weight with felt base. Gift-ready packaging.

name: Sudoku & Logic Puzzle Book
description: 500 original Sudoku puzzles across 5 difficulty levels from beginner to expert. Compact A5 format, printed on thick paper, with solutions at the back.

name: Wireless Charging Pad 15W
description: 15W Qi2 fast wireless charging pad compatible with iPhone, Samsung, and all Qi-enabled devices. LED indicator, anti-slip silicone, and USB-C input. Ultra-slim 6mm profile.

name: Mechanical Pencil Set Professional
description: Set of 4 drafting mechanical pencils in 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, and 0.9mm. Metal barrel with knurled grip, retractable tip, and twist-advance eraser. Ideal for architects.

name: Men's Swim Shorts Quick-Dry
description: Lightweight recycled polyester swim shorts with a mesh lining, side pockets, and zip back pocket. Quick-dry fabric dries in under 30 minutes. UPF 50+ protection.

name: Polarised Sunglasses UV400
description: Lightweight titanium frame polarised sunglasses with UV400 and mirror coating. 8-base wraparound lens for peripheral protection. Includes hard case and cleaning cloth.

name: Leather Bifold Wallet Slim
description: Minimalist full-grain vegetable-tanned leather bifold wallet. RFID blocking, 6 card slots, and a cash section. Gets better with age. Fits in front pocket comfortably.

name: Gym Duffle Bag 40L
description: Water-resistant 40L gym bag with a ventilated shoe compartment, wet/dry separation pocket, and padded laptop sleeve. Carry as hand luggage or over the shoulder.

name: Foam Roller High-Density 90cm
description: Extra-firm high-density EVA foam roller for deep muscle recovery, myofascial release, and balance training. Grid texture for targeted massage. Holds up to 300 lbs.

name: Ultraboost 5 Running Shoes
description: Adidas Ultraboost 5 with Boost cushioning and Primeknit+ upper for responsive energy return and adaptive fit. Continental rubber outsole for superior grip in all conditions.

name: Laptop Stand Adjustable Aluminium
description: Ergonomic aluminium laptop stand with 6 height settings from 5° to 25°. Hollow heat-dissipation design, foldable for travel, compatible with 10–17.3" laptops.

name: Smart Thermostat Wi-Fi
description: Learning smart thermostat with auto-schedule, energy history, and remote control via app. Compatible with Alexa, Google, and Apple HomeKit. Works with 95% of HVAC systems.

name: Gratitude Journal – 90 Day
description: Structured 90-day guided gratitude journal with morning affirmations, evening reflections, and weekly reviews. Premium linen cover, lay-flat binding, and cream pages.

name: Noise-Cancelling Headphones Kids
description: Child-safe 85dB volume-limiting headphones with active noise cancellation. Foldable design, 30-hour battery, and built-in mic. Available in 6 colours.

name: Macro Photography Lens 100mm
description: L-series 100mm f/2.8 macro lens with hybrid image stabilization and quiet STM autofocus motor. 1:1 magnification ratio for true life-size close-up photography.

name: Wooden Montessori Activity Cube
description: 6-sided educational activity cube for toddlers with shape sorter, bead maze, spinning gears, mirror, and clock. Made from FSC-certified solid birch. Ages 12 months+.

name: Succulent & Cactus Potting Mix 5L
description: Professionally blended fast-draining potting mix for succulents, cacti, and arid plants. Contains perlite, pumice, and coarse sand. pH-balanced and pre-fertilised.

name: Desk Organiser Set Walnut
description: 6-piece solid walnut desk organiser including pen cup, letter tray, phone stand, paper clip dish, and cable organiser. Dovetail joinery. Keeps your workspace minimal.

name: Travel Neck Pillow Memory Foam
description: 360° full-neck support memory foam travel pillow with machine-washable velour cover and a press-button buckle clasp. Compresses to half size. Perfect for long flights.

name: Reusable Beeswax Food Wraps
description: Set of 9 reusable beeswax-coated cotton wraps in 3 sizes (S/M/L). Replaces cling film for wrapping food, bowls, and snacks. Compostable and lasts 12+ months.

name: Plant-Based Protein Powder 1kg
description: Organic pea and brown rice protein blend with 26g protein per serving, all 9 essential amino acids, and no artificial sweeteners. Chocolate flavour. Suitable for vegans.

name: Outdoor Solar Garden Lights (8-Pack)
description: IP65 waterproof solar-powered LED path lights with dusk-to-dawn auto on/off. 200 lumens per unit, stainless steel spike design. No wiring needed.

name: Digital Drawing Tablet 10"
description: 10-inch graphic drawing tablet with 8192 pressure levels, tilt recognition, and 60° tilt support. 266 PPS report rate, 8 shortcut keys, and compatible with all major software.

name: Cold Brew Coffee Maker 1L
description: BPA-free borosilicate glass cold brew maker with a fine stainless steel mesh filter. Brew in the fridge for 12–24 hours. Airtight lid keeps brew fresh for 2 weeks.

name: Weighted Blanket 10kg
description: Premium glass-bead weighted blanket in 400-thread-count 100% cotton. Evenly distributed 10kg weight for deep pressure therapy and improved sleep quality.

name: Bamboo Cutting Board Set 3-Piece
description: Organic bamboo cutting board set in 3 sizes with juice groove and handle hole. Naturally antibacterial, harder than maple, and gentle on knife edges.

name: Stainless Steel Meal Prep Containers
description: Set of 5 leak-proof stainless steel meal prep containers with locking lids. BPA-free, oven-safe to 400°F, freezer and dishwasher safe. Multiple compartment sizes.

name: Smart Doorbell Camera HD
description: 1080p HD video doorbell with two-way audio, motion zones, and pre-roll recording. Works with Alexa and Google. Hardwired or battery-powered. Night vision up to 5m.

name: Personalisable Leather Journal A5
description: Handcrafted full-grain buffalo leather journal with 200 pages of 100gsm acid-free paper. Lay-flat binding, ribbon bookmark, and back pocket. Refillable.
